## Background
[What is the context of the work? Enter motivating reasons for your changes, e.g. new skill / wiki structure changes / plugin infrastructure / bug fix / skill improvement ... This can link out to a Jira ticket or Confluence doc, but please write something brief to orient the reviewers. This should answer the question, "Why am I doing this work?". In one word, this is the **motivation** for the work.]

## Definition of Done
[Define this atomic unit of work. A brief description of what is required for an approval on this PR. This should answer the question, "How will I know if this is done and working as intended?" In one word, this is the **feature** being delivered.]

## In this PR
[Please list out major additions, deletions and modifications implemented. This answers the question, "What has changed in the codebase?". In one word, this is the **implementation**. Reference skills, agents, wiki pages, or plugin config as applicable.]

## Testing
[Describe testing done or instructions for testing. For skill changes, describe how to invoke the skill and what output to expect.]

## TODO
- [ ] Optional list to get ahead of reviewer comments

## Checklist
- [ ] Skill changes tested via invocation
- [ ] Wiki conventions followed (bilingual, index, log)
- [ ] Plugin manifest updated (if version/config changed)
- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated (if conventions changed)
